note: Explorer TX detail: chain-position navigation rows. Adds 'next tx' (above the txid line) and 'previous tx' (below the capsule block) to renderIndexedTx and renderFallbackTx. Both rows resolve async via a new _getTxNeighbors helper that pulls the block via getblockhash + getblock, finds the current txid's index in block.txids, and returns the neighbour at index±1 — or, at block boundaries, the last txid of block-1 / first txid of block+1. Walk-through cost: 1 RPC pair for the same-block case, 2 RPC pairs at block boundaries. The lookup is fire-and-forget so the rest of the detail view never blocks on it; placeholder text 'looking up neighbours…' shows while pending and resolves to a clickable txid (cyan + copy-to-clipboard chip + 'block #N' tag) or to '— (chain tip; no later tx yet)' / '— (genesis side; no earlier tx)' when no neighbour exists. Useful for stepping through an auto-split batch (the 5 sibling transfers land at consecutive positions in one block, so click-click-click walks them all). Mempool tx detail unchanged because mempool entries have no positional context until mined. NO consensus, NO RPC schema (uses the existing getblockhash + getblock methods unchanged), NO node, NO miner, NO transaction wire format. Pure explorer UI fix.
